items.title: Fix correctness bugs first
items.detail: Run cext-review-toolkit to find and fix correctness bugs (refcount errors, NULL safety, error handling) before adding thread safety.

items.title: All tests pass on standard Python
items.detail: Ensure the full test suite passes on regular (GIL-enabled) Python before attempting free-threading.

items.title: Set up TSan testing infrastructure
items.detail: Build or obtain a TSan-enabled free-threaded Python. Run: /path/to/tsan-python -m pytest tests/ 2> tsan_report.txt

items.title: Add Py_MOD_GIL_NOT_USED
items.detail: Add {Py_mod_gil, Py_MOD_GIL_NOT_USED} to the module's PyModuleDef_Slot array. Requires multi-phase init.

items.title: Verify compilation with Py_GIL_DISABLED
items.detail: Build the extension against free-threaded Python headers to catch compile-time issues.

items.title: Run TSan baseline
items.detail: PYTHON_GIL=0 /path/to/tsan-python -m pytest tests/ 2> tsan_baseline.txt

items.title: Migrate globals to module state
items.detail: Define module state struct, convert to multi-phase init, move global PyObject* to module state, update all accessor functions.

items.title: Convert static types to heap types
items.detail: Convert static PyTypeObject to PyType_FromSpec/PyType_FromModuleAndSpec. Store type refs in module state.

items.title: Add atomics for shared primitives
items.detail: Replace static bool/int/pointer with _Py_atomic_* or std::atomic. Use appropriate memory ordering.

items.title: Add per-object critical sections
items.detail: Add Py_BEGIN_CRITICAL_SECTION(self)/Py_END_CRITICAL_SECTION(self) to type methods that access self->member.

items.title: Add PyMutex for global data
items.detail: Protect module-level caches, registries, and shared data structures with PyMutex.

items.title: Replace borrowed ref APIs
items.detail: PyDict_GetItem → PyDict_GetItemRef, PyList_GetItem → PyList_GetItemRef, etc.

items.title: Replace deprecated thread-unsafe APIs
items.detail: PyErr_Fetch/Restore → PyErr_GetRaisedException/SetRaisedException

items.title: Protect shared container mutations
items.detail: Add critical sections around PyList_Append, PyDict_SetItem on shared containers.

items.title: Replace PyGILState with real locks
items.detail: PyGILState_Ensure/Release are no-ops under free-threading. Replace with PyMutex or critical sections.

items.title: Run full TSan test suite
items.detail: PYTHON_GIL=0 /path/to/tsan-python -m pytest tests/ 2> tsan_report.txt

items.title: Triage TSan findings
items.detail: Use ft-review-toolkit:explore with tsan aspect to triage findings.

items.title: Write concurrent stress tests
items.detail: Create tests that exercise critical paths from multiple threads simultaneously.

items.title: Achieve TSan-clean status
items.detail: Iterate fixing races and re-running TSan until no extension races remain.

items.title: Add TSan CI job
items.detail: Run tests under TSan on every PR to prevent regressions.

items.title: Document thread-safety invariants
items.detail: Add comments documenting which locks protect which data, threading assumptions.

items.title: Review new code for thread safety
items.detail: Include thread-safety review in PR process for C code changes.
